notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-19 (mubasher.info, raya.com, almeezan.qa): daily outdoor work ban 10:00-15:30 from June 1 to September 15 each year — the longest daily ban window in the GCC (5.5 hours).
Legal basis: Ministerial Decision No. 17 of 2021, per Qatar's official legal portal (almeezan.qa).
Scope is wider than most GCC neighbours: covers not just open-air sites but also shaded sites without adequate ventilation.
Workers have an explicit legal right to stop work and file a complaint if they believe conditions pose a health risk, without disciplinary/discriminatory retaliation — sourced from official coverage.
Single-country event (_countryCode: qa), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
core.type is 'fixed' anchored to June 1 (start date); September 15 end date covered in FAQ/aboutEvent/schemaData.endDate.
